concerns.text: Phase 8 tasks (T060-T065) request work contradicting spec.md's explicit out-of-scope declarations. T061 validates physical bond constraints (spec says physical validation out-of-scope). T062 documents hydration error margins (spec says hydration out-of-scope). T064/T065 update spec/research.md for limitations already documented. Implementer cannot execute tasks that violate the spec.

T032 validates predictions against QM9 DFT reference data, but QM9 IS the training data source (FR-001). This creates circular validation rather than independent verification. Task description does not specify what independent reference data to use for validation.

T063 implements SHAP/Integrated Gradients beyond spec FR-007's specified methods (permutation importance + saliency mapping only). Task asks implementer to exceed documented scope without spec amendment.

Task file paths use 'projects/001-predicting-molecular-dipole-moments/' while constitution.md and plan.md use 'projects/PROJ-262-predicting-molecular-dipole-moments-with/'. Implementer cannot determine correct directory structure. All task paths must match constitution.md project ID.

Both T034 (metrics.csv generation) and T044 (confidence interval computation) handle 95% CI for MAE/RMSE. T034 specifies CI columns in output, T044 computes CIs. Unclear which task owns the actual computation responsibility — implementer cannot determine ownership.

T045 generates feature importance visualizations (data/processed/attributions_*.png), T046 generates performance charts (results/figures/performance_*.png). FR-009 only requires feature importance visualizations. T046's scope exceeds spec without clear justification for the division.

T051 validates RMSE variance < 10% as separate task, but SC-005 requires this metric measured during training (T028/T029). Post-hoc validation task is redundant and creates ambiguity about when/where this metric is computed.

T053 validates literature URLs exist, but Constitution Principle II requires citation verification against primary sources with title-token-overlap ≥ 0.7 threshold. URL existence alone does not satisfy constitutional requirement — task description does not specify title-token-overlap verification.

T019 generates exclusion report with columns {'molecule_id', 'exclusion_reason', 'exclusion_timestamp'}, but does not specify valid values for exclusion_reason field or validation criteria for the report format.

T040 validates ≥3 structural features identified in results/attributions.json, but does not specify how to count/verify 'structural features' — is this based on feature names, importance scores, or ranking threshold?

T033 saves model checkpoints with naming convention model_seed_{N}.pt and rf_seed_{N}.pkl, but does not specify what metadata should be included in checkpoint files or validation criteria for checkpoint integrity.

T007 creates YAML contract schema files (molecule.schema.yaml, feature_set.schema.yaml, model_output.schema.yaml), but does not specify the exact schema structure or validation rules for each schema file.

T009 sets up reproducibility framework with pinned random seeds, but does not specify which random number generators need to be seeded (numpy, torch, python random, etc.) or the exact seed value(s) to use.

T049/T050/T052 enforce time/CPU/memory constraints, but do not specify how constraints are enforced (wrapper functions, decorators, environment variables, or library calls). Implementer cannot determine implementation approach.
T054 updates documentation files (README.md, quickstart.md, research.md), but does not specify what content should be in each file or what format they should follow per plan.md structure.
T057 runs quickstart.md validation to verify end-to-end pipeline, but does not specify what the validation should check or what success criteria define a passing validation.
T058 generates results/summary.md with metrics, attributions, and visualizations, but does not specify what exact metrics/attributions/visualizations should be included or in what format.

T059 updates state file with completion timestamps and content hashes, but does not specify the exact YAML format or what content hashes should be computed (file-level, directory-level, or artifact-level).
